problem id: 6a578940
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  11100001 -> 00001111
  10011110 -> 11110100
  01111111 -> 11111011
  10101010 -> 01010101
  11110001 -> 10001111
  11011110 -> 11110110
  01111000 -> 11000011
  10001110 -> 01110100
  01110110 -> 10110011
  00111000 -> 11000001

query: 00010010
predicted answer: 10010000
